total.description: Net total (deposits minus withdrawals) for the period

end.description: End date of the statement period exactly as it appears

start.description: Start date of the statement period exactly as it appears

period.description: Date range for the account statement period

date.description: Date of the transaction exactly as it appears

total.description: Net balance after applying the deposit and withdrawal

totalDeposits.description: Total amount of deposits during the period

totalWithdrawals.description: Total amount of withdrawals during the period
